item.title: Like even think about what traditionalism is… it’s doing the thing I’m saying but more openly, openly saying u aren’t acting fro...
item.description:
Like even think about what traditionalism is… it’s doing the thing I’m saying but more openly, openly saying u aren’t acting from first principles you are acting from status quo

item.title: Once again: I have many Jewish comrades that do not deserve to be harassed when they do something Jewish online (though it is be...
item.description:
Once again: I have many Jewish comrades that do not deserve to be harassed when they do something Jewish online (though it is becoming of all of us, especially who v**lence has been done in the name of, to reject encounter that v**lence) but for the love of God, do those examples, because suggesting otherwise put all of them at risk#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Wowowoww it’s almost like a program literally built on teaching ppl fro macros the world that they can and should support a harm...
item.description:
Wowowoww it’s almost like a program literally built on teaching ppl fro macros the world that they can and should support a harmful apartheid al ethnostate produced harmful activity’s. Also before anyone comments, yes, Israel having been founded on genocide and apartheid is an illegal occupation, even illegally occupied Yaffa.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Y’all love to be making excuses for people as long as they are your friends or they are in your in group but the second we talk ...
item.description:
Y’all love to be making excuses for people as long as they are your friends or they are in your in group but the second we talk about the exact same thing in a different context or in a different flavour you’re perfectly anti-imperial. Be consistent it’s more fun.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: I want you to like imagine if it was another countries military doing this and saying this (other than Israel’s bc that’s alread...
item.description:
I want you to like imagine if it was another countries military doing this and saying this (other than Israel’s bc that’s already so normalized LOL) It’s fundamentally weird, and it speaks how normalised such work is in our society. #greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
